TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == baluhay nu uma a lami' malingatu misikay tu lami' nu pangcah a lalangawan tu bangcal == " patumi' sa mibulesak tu sasapalan, sakalinga tu sa, Kaliku Hulanwan lalangawan seahuy atu Linwuci, Lalangawan cecenci, Klinku kinsihu malecad tu balucu nina sepatay, pataydan nuheni ku pangcah a lami' tayda i Tapeak, patinaku baluhay nu umah a lami' a papatinakuan tu lalangawan nu hekalay a lami' nipitinakuan, patinakuay a tademaw ci Wseaye tunipatahekalan nida tu cudadan Taywan baluhay nu hekalay a lami'an a kawaw ilabuay nu lami'an a kulitan, babelihan tu sapalan, nu tademaw anipalumaan atu nisakapahan tu liklikan, patinaku tu pangcah nu lalami'an a lalangawan. . sakamusa ku patinakuay ci Wseaye, ayda nu milihidaay tu lami' nu tineng a lalangawan nu sining han caay tu ka hacica, mingalay milihida tu niyadu'ay, ayda hantu mahahiya atu cacudadan mapapaliw, patatungus tu tineng i wawaan. sakamu sa ci Wseaye baluhay nu uma a lami', nipatinakuan tu nu pangcah a tatayna nu sakatanektek tu hida hananay nunisalamian a tineng, atu nisumadan tu natinengan, nipatinakuan a dimian namaka 111 mihcaan 8 bulat 5 demiad katukuh tu 12 bulat 31demiad sa, manamuh tayniyan nu binawlan milihida tu pangcah nu lalamian. katahekalan nu sinbung: yuncumin-cu pasinbungay ( a demiad:2022/08/08) sinbun kisia ci uliu , nina wancan sipakayda i miulicay a matatungusay saka 52,65 matungusay a micukaymas. .
S.PHON: == bar~…ĺuńßaj nu uma a r~…ĺami Ē~ ° mar~…ĺiŇčatu misikaj tu r~…ĺami Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ == " patumi Ē~ ° sa mibur~…ĺ…ôsak tu sasapar~…ĺan, sakar~…ĺiŇča tu sa, kar~…ĺiku ńßur~…ĺanwan r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan s…ôańßuj atu r~…ĺinwu ¶i, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ¶…ô ¶…ôn ¶i, kr~…ĺinku kinsińßu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu bar~…ĺu ¶u nina s…ôpataj, patajdan nuńß…ôni ku paŇč ¶ańß a r~…ĺami Ē~ ° tajda i tap…ôak, patinaku bar~…ĺuńßaj nu umańß a r~…ĺami Ē~ ° a papatinakuan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺami Ē~ ° nipitinakuan, patinakuaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ws…ôaj…ô tunipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nida tu ¶udadan tajwan bar~…ĺuńßaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺami Ē~ °an a kawaw ir~…ĺabuaj nu r~…ĺami Ē~ °an a kur~…ĺitan, bab…ôr~…ĺińßan tu sapar~…ĺan, nu tad…ômaw anipar~…ĺumaan atu nisakapańßan tu r~…ĺikr~…ĺikan, patinaku tu paŇč ¶ańß nu r~…ĺar~…ĺami Ē~ °an a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. . sakamusa ku patinakuaj ¶i ws…ôaj…ô, ajda nu mir~…ĺińßidaaj tu r~…ĺami Ē~ ° nu tin…ôŇč a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu siniŇč ńßan ¶aaj tu ka ńßa ¶i ¶a, miŇčar~…ĺaj mir~…ĺińßida tu nijadu Ē~ °aj, ajda ńßantu mańßańßija atu ¶a ¶udadan mapapar~…ĺiw, patatuŇčus tu tin…ôŇč i wawaan. sakamu sa ¶i ws…ôaj…ô bar~…ĺuńßaj nu uma a r~…ĺami Ē~ °, nipatinakuan tu nu paŇč ¶ańß a tatajna nu sakatan…ôkt…ôk tu ńßida ńßananaj nunisar~…ĺamian a tin…ôŇč, atu nisumadan tu natin…ôŇčan, nipatinakuan a dimian namaka *** mińß ¶aan * bur~…ĺat * d…ômiad katukuńß tu ** bur~…ĺat **d…ômiad sa, manamuńß tajnijan nu binawr~…ĺan mir~…ĺińßida tu paŇč ¶ańß nu r~…ĺar~…ĺamian. katańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu sinbuŇč: jun ¶umin- ¶u pasinbuŇčaj ( a d…ômiad:****/**/**) sinbun kisia ¶i ur~…ĺiu , nina wan ¶an sipakajda i miur~…ĺi ¶aj a matatuŇčusaj saka **,** matuŇčusaj a mi ¶ukajmas. .
S.FORM: == baluhay nu uma a lami' malingatu misikay tu lami' nu pangcah a lalangawan tu bangcal == " patumi' sa mibulesak tu sasapalan, sakalinga tu sa, Kaliku Hulanwan lalangawan seahuy atu Linwuci, Lalangawan cecenci, Klinku kinsihu malecad tu balucu nina sepatay, pataydan nuheni ku pangcah a lami' tayda i Tapeak, patinaku baluhay nu umah a lami' a papatinakuan tu lalangawan nu hekalay a lami' nipitinakuan, patinakuay a tademaw ci Wseaye tunipatahekalan nida tu cudadan Taywan baluhay nu hekalay a lami'an a kawaw ilabuay nu lami'an a kulitan, babelihan tu sapalan, nu tademaw anipalumaan atu nisakapahan tu liklikan, patinaku tu pangcah nu lalami'an a lalangawan. . sakamusa ku patinakuay ci Wseaye, ayda nu milihidaay tu lami' nu tineng a lalangawan nu sining han caay tu ka hacica, mingalay milihida tu niyadu'ay, ayda hantu mahahiya atu cacudadan mapapaliw, patatungus tu tineng i wawaan. sakamu sa ci Wseaye baluhay nu uma a lami', nipatinakuan tu nu pangcah a tatayna nu sakatanektek tu hida hananay nunisalamian a tineng, atu nisumadan tu natinengan, nipatinakuan a dimian namaka 111 mihcaan 8 bulat 5 demiad katukuh tu 12 bulat 31demiad sa, manamuh tayniyan nu binawlan milihida tu pangcah nu lalamian. katahekalan nu sinbung: yuncumin-cu pasinbungay ( a demiad:2022/08/08) sinbun kisia ci uliu , nina wancan sipakayda i miulicay a matatungusay saka 52,65 matungusay a micukaymas. .
S.PHON: == bar~…ĺuńßaj nu uma a r~…ĺami Ē~ ° mar~…ĺiŇčatu misikaj tu r~…ĺami Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ == " patumi Ē~ ° sa mibur~…ĺ…ôsak tu sasapar~…ĺan, sakar~…ĺiŇča tu sa, kar~…ĺiku ńßur~…ĺanwan r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan s…ôańßuj atu r~…ĺinwu ¶i, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ¶…ô ¶…ôn ¶i, kr~…ĺinku kinsińßu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu bar~…ĺu ¶u nina s…ôpataj, patajdan nuńß…ôni ku paŇč ¶ańß a r~…ĺami Ē~ ° tajda i tap…ôak, patinaku bar~…ĺuńßaj nu umańß a r~…ĺami Ē~ ° a papatinakuan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺami Ē~ ° nipitinakuan, patinakuaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ws…ôaj…ô tunipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nida tu ¶udadan tajwan bar~…ĺuńßaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺami Ē~ °an a kawaw ir~…ĺabuaj nu r~…ĺami Ē~ °an a kur~…ĺitan, bab…ôr~…ĺińßan tu sapar~…ĺan, nu tad…ômaw anipar~…ĺumaan atu nisakapańßan tu r~…ĺikr~…ĺikan, patinaku tu paŇč ¶ańß nu r~…ĺar~…ĺami Ē~ °an a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. . sakamusa ku patinakuaj ¶i ws…ôaj…ô, ajda nu mir~…ĺińßidaaj tu r~…ĺami Ē~ ° nu tin…ôŇč a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu siniŇč ńßan ¶aaj tu ka ńßa ¶i ¶a, miŇčar~…ĺaj mir~…ĺińßida tu nijadu Ē~ °aj, ajda ńßantu mańßańßija atu ¶a ¶udadan mapapar~…ĺiw, patatuŇčus tu tin…ôŇč i wawaan. sakamu sa ¶i ws…ôaj…ô bar~…ĺuńßaj nu uma a r~…ĺami Ē~ °, nipatinakuan tu nu paŇč ¶ańß a tatajna nu sakatan…ôkt…ôk tu ńßida ńßananaj nunisar~…ĺamian a tin…ôŇč, atu nisumadan tu natin…ôŇčan, nipatinakuan a dimian namaka *** mińß ¶aan * bur~…ĺat * d…ômiad katukuńß tu ** bur~…ĺat **d…ômiad sa, manamuńß tajnijan nu binawr~…ĺan mir~…ĺińßida tu paŇč ¶ańß nu r~…ĺar~…ĺamian. katańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu sinbuŇč: jun ¶umin- ¶u pasinbuŇčaj ( a d…ômiad:****/**/**) sinbun kisia ¶i ur~…ĺiu , nina wan ¶an sipakajda i miur~…ĺi ¶aj a matatuŇčusaj saka **,** matuŇčusaj a mi ¶ukajmas. .
